reviews.review_description: IM GOING TO SAY THE N WORD IF THIS GAME GETS A UPDATE

Hi monkey donkey you were such a good fan game every day I would hop on just to play this game because it was so fun to branch and make new friends and your moderators were so nice until you got rid of them now the game is just filled the toxicity so no one really plays it anymore. I just wanna let you know that you will always be everyone’s favorite gorilla tag fan game. And whenever you fill safe about the hackers pls make more updates and and bring back the mod vents.i believe in you😁

developer_response.body:
Hello there shaye2k im thankful ti hear you liked the game sadly it will never be updated but i am making a new game just like this

https://discord.gg/8VJjPrrKAc

reviews.review_description: Add me I wanna try to earn mod my discord is Eqale#103930
I love the maps and just everything about it is fantastic. No I’m not saying this because I have mod. I’m saying it because it’s genuinely a good fan game.

Hello my name is chaos. I'm a gorilla tag YouTuber and I like to try fan games. And I was hoping to get mod I can stop racism homophobia and harassment. And help make the game a better place for other monkey's to enjoy. My discord is chaos #0444
